title: Create an S&OP planning packet from constrained demand
given: Open sales orders create near-term product demand and available inventory plus inbound POs do not fully cover it.
when: A planner opens /assistant/planning-bridge and selects Create planning packet.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantPlanningPacket with demand, supply, gap, constraint, scenario, and recommendation JSON.
A leadership summary explains demand units, available units, inbound units, shortage units, and execution constraints.
An advisory Supply Chain Twin scenario draft is created for comparison without changing SO, PO, inventory, WMS, or shipment records.

title: Queue constrained plan for leadership review
given: A planning packet contains shortage gaps or execution constraints.
when: The planner adds an approval note and selects Queue review.
then: An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with the planning score and scenario draft id.
The planning packet moves to REVIEW_QUEUED and records approvedAt plus approvedByUserId.
No demand, supply, inventory, warehouse task, shipment, or scenario execution is applied automatically.

title: Expose WMS and data constraints in the plan
given: There are open WMS tasks, warehouse capacity plans, or master data quality blockers.
when: The assistant builds the planning preview or packet.
then: Constraints are listed with source, severity, detail, object type, and object id.
Recommendation steps include protecting constrained demand, expediting inbound supply, releasing recoverable inventory, and clearing execution bottlenecks.
The plan remains advisory until human review approves concrete source-system actions.
